# How to build a brand that brings high-ticket buyers to you

A 60-minute keynote by Daniel Paul.

Brand colors: near-black #0a0a0a, red #e90d41, off-white #f7f7f8. Fonts: Rethink Sans for headings, Inter for body. Editorial print magazine feel. No emojis. No icons. Big type. Lots of white space.

---

## Title slide

**How to build a brand that brings high-ticket buyers to you.**

Without becoming louder. Without becoming someone you're not.

*Daniel Paul · 60 minutes · today*

Visual: black background, off-white text, single red dot top-right corner.

---

## The question

**Why do some people charge $20,000 for the same hour someone else charges $200?**

Visual: off-white background, "$20,000" in red, the rest in near-black, big bold typography filling 70% of the slide.

---

## The frame

**Today is not about getting more clients.**

**Today is about being the person they were already looking for.**

Visual: two stacked lines, first line in near-black, second line in red. Off-white background. No image.

---

## Where I started

**Broke. No team. No list. No credibility.**

2020. Charging $300 to build websites.

Visual: split layout. Left side big black text. Right side moody desaturated founder portrait on near-black background panel.

---

## The crossover

**I stopped chasing clients.**

**I started building a brand.**

Visual: centered two-line statement, second line in red. White space all around.

---

## The names

**SAME STAGE. SAME GREEN ROOM.**

Robert Kiyosaki

Mac Attram

Sandy Jadeja

18 months later.

**2020: broke. 2026: $250,000 from a stage.**

Visual: red eyebrow at top, three massive black names stacked, small silver caption "18 months later," then a bold red anchor line at the bottom: "2020: broke. 2026: $250,000 from a stage."

---

## What I sold

**I didn't have a better offer.**

**I had a better brand.**

Visual: two-line stack, second line in red. Off-white canvas.

---

## The lesson

**The brand walks in the room before you do.**

Visual: huge centered text on a near-black background. This is the signature line of the talk. Off-white text. Big.

---

## What just happened

**AI · 2024 → 2026**

**$50,000/yr → $20/mo**

The price of a skill, today.

Visual: tiny red eyebrow at top. Then a massive red stat. Small caption below.

---

## The bundling

**Skills are being bundled.**

- Copywriting + research + design + editing + coding. One subscription.
- One Claude agent does the work of five juniors.
- Your competitor across the world has the same tools you do. For the same price. Today.

Visual: section title at top, then three black-bordered cards side by side in a row. No rounded corners. Editorial.

---

## The collapse

**Anyone can copy your tone.**

**Anyone can copy your offer.**

**Anyone can copy your funnel.**

Visual: three stacked statements. First two in near-black, last one in red.

---

## The one thing left

**Trust is the most expensive asset of 2026.**

Visual: huge centered statement on near-black background. The word "expensive" in red. Off-white for the rest.

---

## The framework

**THE FRAMEWORK**

**1 · 1 · 1 · 1**

One platform. One year. One audience. One call to action.

Visual: tiny red eyebrow at top, then massive "1 · 1 · 1 · 1" numerals centered, caption below.

---

## Rule 1 of 4 · One platform

**RULE 1 / 4**

**Pick one platform.**

**Stay for one year.**

Visual: red eyebrow, two-line stack, second line in red.

---

## Why one platform wins

**100,000 wrong followers.**

**1,000 right ones.**

1,000 right people will pay you more than 100,000 wrong ones.

Visual: top line in silver, divider line, bottom line in huge black. Caption beneath.

---

## Rule 2 of 4 · One year

**RULE 2 / 4**

**You don't have a content problem.**

**You have a quitting problem.**

Visual: red eyebrow, two-line stack, second line in red.

---

## The honest timeline

**The honest timeline.**

| Period | What happens |
|---|---|
| Months 1 – 3 | Invisible. |
| Months 4 – 9 | The algorithm finds you. |
| Month 10 onward | **Inbound starts.** |

Visual: section title at top. Three rows separated by thin hairline dividers. Last row's verdict in red.

---

## Rule 3 of 4 · One audience

**RULE 3 / 4**

**Stop being useful to everyone.**

**Be unforgettable to one.**

Visual: red eyebrow, two-line stack, second line in red.

---

## The mirror test

> I write every post like it's a DM to one person. That's why the right one always replies.

Visual: massive red quotation mark in top-left corner. Large quote in near-black filling the slide. Off-white canvas.

---

## Rule 4 of 4 · One CTA

**RULE 4 / 4**

**One ask.**

**Repeated quietly.**

**For one year.**

Visual: red eyebrow, three-line stack, last line in red.

---

## What a great CTA sounds like

**OFF**
"DM me to learn more."

**ON**
"Comment OPTIMIZER and I'll send you the tool."

Visual: two side-by-side cards. Left card has black border and silver eyebrow saying "OFF". Right card has red border and red eyebrow saying "ON". Black body text in both. No rounded corners.

---

## Why the four ones work

**Repetition is not boring.**

**Repetition is recognition.**

Same person. Same platform. Same audience. Same ask. For one year.

Visual: two-line statement, second line in red. Silver caption below.

---

## Monday morning version

**WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE**

**2 hrs / week.**

From your phone. No team. No agency.

Visual: red eyebrow, then a single massive stat in black. Sub in slightly smaller black.

---

## The cadence

**Three posts a week. Same window.**

| Mon | Tue | Wed | Thu | Fri | Sat | Sun |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| — | **POST** | **POST** | **POST** | — | — | — |

Visual: title at top, then a row of seven square boxes. Tue/Wed/Thu boxes filled red with off-white "POST" text. Other days outlined with silver dash.

---

## The content stack

**FOREVER STACK**

- **TUE · Story** — One thing that happened to you this week.
- **WED · Lesson** — One sharp thing you learned doing your work.
- **THU · Asset** — One thing you can give away for free.

Visual: red eyebrow at top. Three equal black-bordered cards side by side. Each card has a tiny red day label, a big black title, and small Inter body text.

---

## The gift

**FROM ME TO YOU**

**Your LinkedIn profile is the storefront.**

**Most of you left the door locked.**

Visual: red eyebrow, two-line stack, second line in red.

Scan. Or open it on your phone now.

Start building yours tonight.
